name: Eco Dry Option Allowables

name: Damp Alert Status
description: Indicates whether the clothes are damp
comment: Damp Alert Status: Enum read-only sensor.

description: Use this ERD to request a change of ERD 0x204A Damp Alert option selection
comment: Damp Alert Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the damp alert option.  If the bit is true the given setting is allowed.
comment: Damp Alert Option Allowables: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Dryer Dryness Level Request
description:
Use this ERD to request a change of ERD 0x204D Dryness Level option.
- Follows the [Option with Bitmapped Allowables](https://github.com/geappliances/documentation.erd-specification/blob/master/docs/clothes_dryer/option_bitmap_allowables.md)

Depends on
- 0x2000 Machine State must not be Idle or Commissioning.
comment: Dryer Dryness Level Request: Enum writable select.

name: Dryer Dryness Option Allowables
description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the dryness option.  If the bit is true the given setting is allowed.
comment: Dryer Dryness Option Allowables: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Dryer Dryness Option Selection
description:
Current selection for the Dryness option.

ERD is in both
- API V1 Foundation and API V1 Dryness Option
- API V1 Dryness Option

API V1 Dryness Option takes precedence.

data_owner = 'shared' when used via V1 Foundation

data_owner = 'device' when used via V1 Dryness Option
comment: Dryer Dryness Option Selection: Enum writable select.

name: Dryer Temperature Level Request
description:
Use this ERD to request a change in the ERD 0x2050 Temperature Level Option.
- Follows the [Option with Bitmapped Allowables](https://github.com/geappliances/documentation.erd-specification/blob/master/docs/clothes_dryer/option_bitmap_allowables.md)

Depends on
- 0x2000 Machine State must not be Idle or Commissioning.
comment: Dryer Temperature Level Request: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Dryer Temperature Option Allowables
description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the temperature option.  If the bit is true the given setting is allowed.
comment: Dryer Temperature Option Allowables: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Dryer Temperature Option Selection
description:
Current selection for the Temperature Option.

ERD 0x2050 is in both API V1 Foundation and API V1 Temperature Option

API V1 TemperatureOption takes precedence.

data_owner = 'shared' when used via V1 Foundation

data_owner = 'device' when used via V1 Temperature Option
comment: Dryer Temperature Option Selection: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Prewash Option Request

comment: Prewash Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Prewash Option
description: Specifies option value for prewash option.
comment: Prewash Option: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

DryerSmallLoadOptionAllowables.Dryer Small Load Option Enable Allowed

name: Washer Link Data
description: Data transferred from washer to dryer for the washer link feature.
comment: Washer Link Data: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Load Recommended Washer Link Cycle Request
description:
Write 255 to this 0x206A to load the cycle in 0x206B Recommended Washer Link Cycle.
The ERD will reset back to normal automatically after writing.

Depends on
- 0x206C Washer Link Option Selection must be Enabled

0x2096 Load Recommended Washer Link Cycle Request is a member of both
- V1 Washer Link and
- V1 Washer Link 2
comment: Load Recommended Washer Link Cycle Request: Enum writable select.

name: Recommended Washer Link Cycle
description:
The recommended cycle to run on the dryer based on the information received from the washer in 0x2069 Washer Link Data or 0x2096 Washer Link 2 Data

Depends on
  - 0x2069 Washer Link Data
  - 0x2096 Washer Link 2 Data

0x206B Recommended Washer Link Cycle is a member of both
  - V1 Washer Link and
  - V1 Washer Link 2
comment: Recommended Washer Link Cycle: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Washer Link Option Selection
description:
Current Selection for the Washer Link Option

0x206C Washer Link Option Selection is a member of both
- V1 Washer Link and
- V1 Washer Link 2
comment: Washer Link Option Selection: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Washer Link Option Request
description:
Use this Erd to request a change of the Washer Link Option.
  - Follows the [Option with Bitmapped Allowables](https://github.com/geappliances/documentation.erd-specification/blob/master/docs/clothes_dryer/option_bitmap_allowables.md)

0x206D Washer Link Option Request' is a member of both
  - V1 Washer Link and
  - V1 Washer Link 2

Some units have the WasherLink Option on the cycle knob. In these units:
  - a change in the washer link option can not be requested remotely.
  - the bitmapped allowables linked above will indicate no options can be selected remotely.
comment: Washer Link Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Washer Link Option Allowables
description:
Bitmap of allowable option selections for the washer link option. If the bit is true, then the given setting is allowed.

0x206E Washer Link Option Allowables is a member of both
- V1 Washer Link and
- V1 Washer Link 2
comment: Washer Link Option Allowables: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Blocked Vent Fault Active
description: Notifies the user via the app whether Blocked Vent Fault is active.
comment: Blocked Vent Fault Active: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Tank Level Became 'Low' At End Of Cycle
description: Each time this signal value changes, the amount of detergent in the Smart Dispense tank has transitioned from 'Filled' to 'Low' in the process of running a cycle with Smart Dispense on. It is stored in NV memory.

data.name: Smart Dispense Tank Transitioned to Low

comment: Smart Dispense Tank Level Became 'Low' At End Of Cycle: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Detergent Dispense Flow Rate Bucket Selection
description: This ERD determines which flow rate bucket is selected for smart detergent dispense. Number of buckets is determined by 0x20C0. It is stored in NV memory.
comment: Smart Detergent Dispense Flow Rate Bucket Selection: Enum writable select.

name: Smart Detergent Dispense Time

comment: Smart Detergent Dispense Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Vent Cycle Option Selection
description:
Current selection for the Smart Vent Cycle Option.
- Disabled = Releases the selection of the Smart Vent Cycle; the cycle selected is based on the current state of the device
- Enabled = Selects the Smart Vent Cycle

Depends on
- 0x2083 Dryer Control Lock Option Selection
comment: Smart Vent Cycle Option Selection: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Smart Vent Cycle Option Request
description:
This ERD requests a change in the smart vent cycle option status. When a request has been processed, the unit will update this value to 0xFF.

Depends on
- 0x2094 Smart Vent Cycle Option Allowables
comment: Smart Vent Cycle Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the smart vent cycle option. If the bit is true the given setting is allowed.

values.3: Smart Vent Restriction Result - Needs Attention

comment: Smart Vent Restriction Result: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Washer Link 2 Data
description:
Washer link 2 Data is sent from washer to dryer in a single ERD to prevent race conditions.
 - Washer will communicate 0xFFFF for dry load weight when value is unknown for the last cycle.
 - Washer will communicate 0xFFFF for wet load weight when value is unknown for the last cycle.
comment: Washer Link 2 Data: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Power Care Option Request
description: Request a change of the Power Care option. This allows a user to select a scale of how delicate or aggressive their wash should be. `0 Power 4 Care` is the most delicate, while `4 Power 0 Care` is the most aggressive.
comment: Power Care Option Request: Enum writable select.

name: Power Care Option
description: The current power care option value.
comment: Power Care Option: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Remote Cycle Selection Request
description:
Erd used to request a cycle to be selected by an appliance.
- After being written, this ERD value is reset to 0xFF.
- If the request is granted, the currently selected cycle is reflected in 0x200A Laundry Current Selected Cycle.
comment: Remote Cycle Selection Request: Enum writable select.

name: Remote Cycle Selection Allowables
description: Bitmap of allowable cycle selections. If the bit is true the given cycle is allowed.

Remote Cycle Allowable - Towels or Sheets
Remote Cycle Allowable - Washer Steam Refresh

Remote Cycle Allowable - Rinse and Spin
Remote Cycle Allowable - Single Item Wash

Remote Cycle Allowable - Ultra Fresh Vent
Remote Cycle Allowable - Quick or Airfluff
Remote Cycle Allowable - Auto Extra Dry
Remote Cycle Allowable - Auto Damp Dry
Remote Cycle Allowable - Rinse and Dry
Remote Cycle Allowable - Wool or Knit
Remote Cycle Allowable - Rain or Snow
Remote Cycle Allowable - Suits or Coats
Remote Cycle Allowable - King Size Comforter
Remote Cycle Allowable - Drain, Spin and Dry

comment: Remote Cycle Selection Allowables: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.
